title: Catalog ≥15 candidate open Ewing transcriptomes
context: A provenance-first dataset catalog is the backbone of a reproducible Ewing Sarcoma reanalysis (PLAN §3/§8). Before any reprocessing, we enumerate candidate PUBLIC transcriptome series so downstream license, datasheet and reproduction work has a stable, auditable list. Binding guardrails: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA/biobanks) and identifiable patient data are out of scope; COSMIC/OncoKB/MSigDB-restricted are recipe-reference only; no clinical/diagnostic/prognostic/treatment language; research-only, not medical advice; provenance on every assertion.
objective: Produce a structured catalog of at least 15 candidate open-access Ewing Sarcoma RNA-seq/expression series (accessions, source repository, assay, sample counts, putative license) with provenance for each entry.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 15 candidate open Ewing transcriptome series catalogued with accession, source repository (GEO/SRA/ENA/recount3/ARCHS4), assay type, and sample count.
Each entry records a putative license and a provenance pointer (URL/accession) for later verification.
Controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA/biobank) series are excluded from the catalog or explicitly flagged out-of-scope.
Catalog is machine-readable (CSV/JSON) and committed under output/ with a short README.
output: output/dataset-catalog.csv (machine-readable catalog of ≥15 candidate open Ewing transcriptomes + README).
